how: PR #657 restored notification mark-all behavior and settings labels. PR #659 constrained SideDrawer and AppSettingsDrawer to the central content area between AppCapsule and BottomNav, repaired notification item wrapping and mark-all hit area, and folded account settings below primary map display settings so right-drawer controls remain immediately hittable.
problem: Left/right drawers could visually escape the intended content area, notification card text clipped, and the settings drawer primary switch could be pushed below the viewport by account settings content.
remainingGap: None for the TSK-021-08 drawer regression correction scope.
validationSeams: touched files UTF-8 no BOM check
why: Keep information drawers and settings drawers from covering primary chrome while preserving clear ownership between SideDrawer, AppSettingsDrawer, AppCapsule, and BottomNav.
